claim: Hauling grease-trap and grit-trap waste in Texas is governed by Title 30 TAC Chapter 312 (Sludge Use, Disposal, and Transportation); transporter registration is 30 TAC §312.142 and the trip-ticket/manifest + recordkeeping rule is 30 TAC §312.145.
notes: RESOLVED toward Subchapter F ('Liquid Waste Transporters', §§312.141-312.150) by independent verification run 20260624-205425-tx-fog-grease-trap-verify-57bf0a (agrees with Cornell LII; the 'Subchapter G' label traces to dated TCEQ guidance RG-086). Section numbers were never in dispute; cite by section number. See verification/comparison-report.md.
